mapper.select: SELECT a.USER_ID, a.GROUP_TYPE, a.GROUP_ID, a.CAN_VIEW, a.CAN_EDIT, a.MODIFY_USER_ID, a.MODIFY_AT, CASE WHEN a.GROUP_TYPE = 'ASSET' THEN g.GROUP_NAME WHEN a.GROUP_TYPE = 'WATCH' THEN wg.GROUP_NAME END AS GROUP_NAME FROM R_USER_GROUP_ACCESS_T a LEFT JOIN R_GROUP_T g ON a.GROUP_TYPE = 'ASSET' AND a.GROUP_ID = g.GROUP_ID AND g.DELETE_AT IS NULL LEFT JOIN R_WATCH_GROUP_T wg ON a.GROUP_TYPE = 'WATCH' AND a.GROUP_ID = wg.WATCH_GROUP_ID WHERE a.USER_ID = #{USER_ID} ORDER BY a.GROUP_TYPE, a.GROUP_ID

SELECT a.USER_ID, a.GROUP_TYPE, a.GROUP_ID, a.CAN_VIEW, a.CAN_EDIT, a.MODIFY_USER_ID, a.MODIFY_AT, CASE WHEN a.GROUP_TYPE = 'ASSET' THEN g.GROUP_NAME WHEN a.GROUP_TYPE = 'WATCH' THEN wg.GROUP_NAME END AS GROUP_NAME FROM R_USER_GROUP_ACCESS_T a LEFT JOIN R_GROUP_T g ON a.GROUP_TYPE = 'ASSET' AND a.GROUP_ID = g.GROUP_ID AND g.DELETE_AT IS NULL LEFT JOIN R_WATCH_GROUP_T wg ON a.GROUP_TYPE = 'WATCH' AND a.GROUP_ID = wg.WATCH_GROUP_ID WHERE a.USER_ID = #{USER_ID} AND a.GROUP_TYPE = #{GROUP_TYPE} ORDER BY a.GROUP_ID
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO R_USER_GROUP_ACCESS_T (USER_ID, GROUP_TYPE, GROUP_ID, CAN_VIEW, CAN_EDIT, MODIFY_USER_ID, MODIFY_AT) VALUES (#{USER_ID}, #{GROUP_TYPE}, #{GROUP_ID}, #{CAN_VIEW}, #{CAN_EDIT}, #{MODIFY_USER_ID}, NOW())

INSERT INTO R_USER_GROUP_ACCESS_T (USER_ID, GROUP_TYPE, GROUP_ID, CAN_VIEW, CAN_EDIT, MODIFY_USER_ID, MODIFY_AT) VALUES
(#{item.USER_ID}, #{item.GROUP_TYPE}, #{item.GROUP_ID}, #{item.CAN_VIEW}, #{item.CAN_EDIT}, #{item.MODIFY_USER_ID}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM R_USER_GROUP_ACCESS_T WHERE USER_ID = #{USER_ID} AND GROUP_TYPE = #{GROUP_TYPE}
